title: Split consignment: Valid and Rejected cheds are generated when commodities have checks updated to compliant and non compliant
outcome: Creates a two-commodity CHED-PP pre-notification end-to-end (06011010 + 14019000) and submits it, then in the BCP Decision service records PHSI documentary/physical/identity checks per commodity (commodity-1 Hold with reasons, commodity-2 Hold then Compliant), splits the consignment from the notification review page, and asserts the resulting Valid/Rejected CHED tabs — the final assertion on locator('#valid') failed because the Valid CHED showed commodity 06011010 instead of the expected 14019000.

errors.detail: Timed out after 5000ms. Received text contained 'CHEDPP.GB.2026.1526042V' with Commodity code 06011010 rather than the expected 14019000.
